notes: Core mechanics partially work but river collision detection is broken (frog dies immediately in water even on logs due to grid/pixel coordinate mismatch), home bay detection is unreliable, and the visual layout lacks proper safe zones and road markings making it hard to distinguish game areas.

The game has a fatal flaw in the river section: the frog's gridX is not updated while riding logs, causing the frog to teleport back to its original X-column when jumping off, making it nearly unplayable.
Core Frogger loop is present and mostly works, but lane/layout inaccuracies, simplistic visuals, and some collision/grid inconsistencies keep it well short of a polished or faithful build.
